workflow.descSales: Client development · Inquiry classification · Price inquiry · Soft/Firm offer
workflow.descContract: Contract details · Drafting · New order registration · Signing · Sending
workflow.descProcurement: Procurement conditions · Supplier confirmation · Purchase contract · Payment
workflow.descBooking: Freight inquiry · Booking · Actual cost confirmation
workflow.descCollection: Follow-up payment · Release confirmation · After-sales · Filing
workflow.stepClassifyDesc: Communicate inquiry details with client (size, quantity, material, product usage, quality requirements, current supply channel), classify as A/B/C/D level and inform purchasing. Select level, upload background files, and click save to complete.
workflow.stepPriceInquiryDesc: Fill in product requirements and submit to supply chain management. Purchasing completes the inquiry and sends back the final quote. Note: Complete role assignment on the right first.
workflow.stepSoftOfferDesc: Must reply within 6 hours (max 12 hours). Email must CC direct supervisor and sales manager. Fill in quotation details, select approver and submit. Approver confirms to proceed.
workflow.stepSoftOfferApproval: Formal quotation requires Sales Supervisor review
workflow.stepFirmOfferDesc: Can only reply with firm offer after goods specs/tolerance/material/price/source/payment/logistics are all confirmed. Fill in quotation, select approver and submit.
workflow.stepFirmOfferApproval: Requires Sales Supervisor approval (>=5M CNY/700K USD requires Sales Manager)
workflow.stepConfirmDetailsDesc: Confirm buyer company name, address, country, quantity/amount, payment method, payment bank, expected collection date with client. Send contract summary to order operations group. Doc clerk confirms contract number. If Sinosure needed, provide buyer info for credit limit.
workflow.stepDraftContractDesc: Salesperson sends SC DRAFT EMAIL with product name/material/specs/quantity/unit price/delivery/payment/special requirements to doc clerk (CC sales supervisor and manager). Doc clerk drafts, salesperson reviews. Contract terms based on 2025-01 version.
workflow.stepOrderNoteDesc: Salesperson fills expected costs into new order registration form and submits to sales supervisor (>= 300K USD or 2M CNY requires sales manager signature).
workflow.stepOrderNoteApproval: Sales Supervisor signs; >= 300K USD/2M CNY requires Sales Manager
workflow.stepSignContractDesc: Contract draft with order registration submitted to sales supervisor for signing and stamping (OA payment requires sales manager regardless of amount).
workflow.stepSignContractApproval: Supervisor signs and stamps (OA: Manager signs); >= 300K USD/2M requires Manager
workflow.stepSendContractDesc: Document clerk confirms contract has been co-signed by both parties and uploads the signed contract.
workflow.stepProcurementCheckDesc: Procurement allowed after deposit received, clean LC original received, or signed sales contract received. Non-compliant is "risk procurement" requiring supervisor/manager/risk manager approval.
workflow.stepProcurementCheckApproval: Risk procurement: <= 300K USD/2M CNY and resalable, Sales Manager confirms; otherwise Risk Manager reports to GM
workflow.stepConfirmSupplierDesc: Sales supervisor selects supplier from directory, informs purchasing manager and doc clerk of procurement intent (unit price/delivery/payment). New suppliers require business license and payment info.
workflow.stepSignPurchaseDesc: Purchasing manager uploads signed purchase contract. Contract is archived in supplier management.
workflow.stepPayDepositDesc: Doc clerk submits signed contracts and payment documents to finance. Salesperson, supervisor, and purchasing manager all sign the payment voucher (>= 300K USD/2M requires sales manager co-sign).
workflow.stepPayDepositApproval: Payment voucher: Salesperson + Supervisor + Purchasing Manager sign; >= 300K USD/2M requires Manager co-sign
workflow.stepFreightInquiryDesc: Book 10-20 days before goods ready. Compare freight and port charges from >= 2 freight forwarders in the logistics supplier evaluation list.
workflow.stepBookingDesc: Bulk cargo: Inform doc clerk/supervisor in group, supervisor confirms forwarding agent (>500 tons requires manager). Container: Inform contract no/carrier/schedule/container type/quantity/freight, supervisor confirms (>10 TEU requires manager).
workflow.stepBookingApproval: Supervisor confirms (bulk >500t/container >10 TEU requires Manager); Risk booking requires Risk Manager or GM
workflow.stepCostConfirmDesc: After loading, doc clerk verifies costs match booking. Salesperson signs cost breakdown, pays on schedule.
workflow.stepLabelsDesc: Doc clerk creates SHIPPING MARK label sample within 1 week of contract signing. Salesperson confirms with client and informs factory. Verify labels 3 days before production.
workflow.stepInspectionDesc: Salesperson decides on factory inspection, assigns inspectors, photos uploaded. Legal/commercial inspection: schedule time/location/items.
workflow.stepPackingDetailsDesc: Salesperson requests cargo details promptly. Doc clerk prepares packing list and sends to freight forwarder.
workflow.stepWarehouseEntryDesc: After receiving cargo details, doc clerk registers purchase warehousing in the system.
workflow.stepPayBalanceDesc: Doc clerk processes payment. Cashier pays. Doc clerk confirms VAT invoice date with supplier, checks invoice upon receipt.
workflow.stepDeliveryNoticeDesc: Print delivery notice with loading requirements. Salesperson and supervisor sign. Doc clerk sends to supplier.
workflow.stepDeliveryNoticeApproval: Manager sign required if delivery conditions not met (>100K USD requires Risk Manager/GM)
workflow.stepGodadBillingDesc: Doc clerk completes system billing in the month of delivery.
workflow.stepCustomsDesc: Doc clerk prepares customs documents and sends to freight forwarder. Verify declaration items match invoices.
workflow.stepClearancePhotosDesc: Doc clerk confirms clearance with freight forwarder. Salesperson/doc clerk obtains loading/shipping photos.
workflow.stepShipmentNoticeDesc: Doc clerk prepares shipment notice within 2 business days after sailing.
workflow.stepDocumentsDesc: Doc clerk prepares full set of negotiation documents and attachment scans, sends with shipment notice to salesperson. Track receipt after submission.
workflow.stepDocumentsApproval: Submission no later than 2nd business day after receiving B/L
workflow.stepFollowPaymentDesc: Non-LC: Salesperson follows up. Send payment receipt to group. Doc clerk checks amount/currency/beneficiary/account within 1 business day. Cashier verifies payment.
workflow.stepRiskDeliveryDesc: When client requests release with outstanding payment under deferred TT, this is "risk delivery". Doc clerk reports to supervisor, manager, and risk manager.
workflow.stepRiskDeliveryApproval: <= 100K USD/700K CNY: Manager approves; Above: Risk Manager reports to GM
workflow.stepArrivalNoticeDesc: Salesperson emails client 7 days before ETA to prepare for receipt.
workflow.stepAfterSalesDesc: 15 days after arrival, salesperson requests doc clerk to send Customer Satisfaction Survey, CC supervisor. Track usage and quality feedback.
workflow.stepFilingDesc: All documents and photos uploaded to cloud drive. Finance uploads payment receipts. Paper copies filed in cabinet.
workflow.assignRolesFirst: Please assign roles above first (Salesperson + Purchasing)
workflow.submittedToSC: Submitted to supply chain, waiting for purchase quote...
workflow.goToSCHint: Go to Supply Chain -> Purchase Inquiry to check progress
workflow.fillQuotation: Fill in price terms, validity, special conditions...
workflow.approveAndProceed: Approve and proceed to next step
workflow.pathAUploadProof: Path A: Upload payment proof (deposit/clean LC/signed contract)
workflow.pathBRiskProcurement: Path B: Risk Procurement — Three-party approval
workflow.supervisorSelectSupplier: Sales Supervisor: Select from supplier directory
workflow.waitingSupervisorSupplier: Waiting for Sales Supervisor to select and confirm supplier...
workflow.pmFillPurchase: Purchasing Manager: Fill purchase contract number and upload
workflow.confirmSignCreatePO: Confirm sign and create purchase order
workflow.waitingPMUpload: Waiting for Purchasing Manager to upload contract...
workflow.supervisorUploadSign: Supervisor/Manager: Upload signed contract + fill contract number and amount
workflow.waitingSupervisorSign: Waiting for Supervisor/Manager to upload signed contract...
workflow.fourPartySign: Four-party signature confirmation on payment voucher
workflow.waitingSalespersonOffline: Waiting for salesperson to confirm offline completion...
workflow.stageNotesPlaceholder: Record key information, special circumstances, communication results for this stage...
workflow.freightCompareHint: Compare freight/port charges from ≥2 freight forwarders
workflow.waitingDraftUpload: Waiting for doc clerk to upload draft agreement...
workflow.waitingCounterSigned: Waiting for doc clerk to upload counter-signed agreement...
workflow.conditionsHint: Payment obligations before shipment completed / Clean LC issued
workflow.riskBookingHint: Conditions not met, requires supervisor + manager + risk manager approval
workflow.waitingConditions: Waiting for both to confirm conditions...
workflow.designateHint: Supervisor designates forwarder (>10 TEU requires manager)
workflow.waitingBookingForm: Waiting for doc clerk to upload booking form...
workflow.fillConfirmedPrice: Fill in confirmed price (after forwarder confirms)
workflow.waitingCargoUpload: Waiting for salesperson to upload cargo details...
workflow.waitingPackingUpload: Waiting for doc clerk to upload packing list...
workflow.waitingVatUpload: Waiting for doc clerk to upload VAT invoice...
workflow.waitingCustomsDocs: Waiting for doc clerk to upload customs documents...
